general.title: General
general.languageDescription: Switch MyAgents interface copy. This does not change AI reply language.
general.autostartDescription: Run MyAgents automatically when the system starts
general.saveFailedRetry: Failed to save. Please try again.
general.minimizeToTrayDescription: Minimize to the system tray when closing the window instead of quitting
general.forceWakeDescription: When enabled, this computer will not automatically sleep even when no AI task is running. Closing the lid still sleeps the computer and battery drains faster.
general.defaultWorkspaceDescription: Default workspace path used on the launcher
general.queueTurnDescription: Send the next queued message only after AI finishes the current turn
general.queueRealtimeDescription: AI reads messages while running and decides when to respond
general.notificationEnableDescription: Notify when AI finishes a task or needs your confirmation
general.notificationSoundDescription: Play a sound when system notifications appear
general.proxyDescription: Configure an HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy for external API requests, such as Clash or V2Ray
general.proxyEnableDescription: Route all API requests through the proxy server when enabled
general.proxyAppliedHint: Changes are applied automatically to running sessions
general.proxyProbeFailed: Proxy check failed. Please try again later.
general.logsDescription: Export logs from the last 3 days for troubleshooting

order.title: Enable & Sort
order.description: Control which providers can be used by chats, tasks, and bots, and their order in model selectors.
order.description2: Disabled providers are hidden from the settings list and model selectors. Re-enabling keeps existing configuration.

helper.title: AI Helper
helper.placeholder: Tell the AI Helper what you want: configure models, add MCP, troubleshoot issues, send feedback, or attach a web link or screenshot. The helper can handle it for you.
helper.emptyTip: Enter what you want or attach an image
helper.feedbackEmptyTip: Describe the issue or add an image
helper.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe the issue you ran into, or share feedback and suggestions

about.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app
about.upToDate: You are already on the latest version
about.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
about.developerParagraph1: MyAgents is a desktop AI Agent client that lives on your computer: your personal AI center. It runs on the Claude Agent SDK, supports multiple model providers, and lets you switch quickly. Operations happen locally, and your data stays on your computer.
about.developerParagraph2: Claude Code let developers experience AI-amplified productivity first, while OpenClaw showed a glimpse of proactive agent assistants for everyone. MyAgents aims to make local agents complete: when you are at your computer, it can reach your files, projects, and tools to collaborate precisely and produce high-quality work; when you are away, it can act like your delegate, sensing the world 24/7 and continuing to work from your intent.
about.developerParagraph3: Unlike AI tools that need a fresh introduction every conversation, Agents in MyAgents sync deeply with your life and work and become partners that understand you better over time. We want it to become a super-amplifier for everyone's intent:
about.developerQuote: You have an idea. And it's done.
about.runtimeDescription: Enable external runtimes such as Claude Code CLI and Codex CLI in the input box and Agent settings. Disable this to use the built-in runtime only.
about.cliRegistryDescription: Allow AI to create and register command-line tools, then manage them in Toolbox. New sessions can discover enabled tools automatically. MCP and built-in myagents CLI capabilities are not affected.
about.desktopPetDescription: Mino's desktop pet: a floating ball that stays near the screen edge, lets you glance on hover, click to ask, and lets the pet keep running after you send. Once enabled, you can manage it from Settings.
about.helperDescription: The AI Helper can analyze local logs to answer questions, report issues, or send suggestions
about.communityDescription: Scan the QR code to join and talk with other users
